title: Finite Gradient Descent Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite gradient-descent bad decrease, step-coordinate, and descent-bound QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact descent-step replay computes objective decrease 11/4 for a quadratic gradient step, so the malformed decrease 2 row has error 3/4; the same replay computes next_x = 1/2, so the malformed step-coordinate row claiming next_x = 3/4 is contradictory; descent-bound replay computes slack 1/4, so the malformed nonpositive-slack row is contradictory.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional descent-step rows only when they add distinct step-size, line-search, projected-gradient, stochastic, or convergence pressure; keep general gradient-descent convergence and rates in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite gradient-descent witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay quadratic gradients, Hessians, step updates, objective values, norm squares, descent lower bounds, and slack over exact rationals.
Route false finite descent, step-coordinate, and descent-bound slack claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending exact-rational conflict.
Keep general convergence, rates, line-search theory, stochastic variants, and numerical stability claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
